details.IncidentDetail: "[9] [Notification] [CHP]-STAA RECEIVED 2 CALLS 1 WITNESS FOLLOWED SV OFF THE RD OFF SORRENTO VEH STOPPED AT 10710 ROSELLE ST IT LBLU BMW PLT 5MCR351 -- DRIVER IS HMA 30'S 5'8 170LBS BUZZED HAIRI BLK LONG SLEEVE SHIRT KHAKI PANTS POSSIBLY HBD -- AND DEFECATED IN THE MIDDLE OF THE STREET ---LAST SEEN RUNNING EB INTO THE BUSINESS AREA -- ALSO THE WITNESS THAT FOLLOWED THE SV WAS INVOLVED IN A PHYSICAL 415 WITH THE SUSPECT AND 1023ING FOR STAA FOR THE ASSAULT IN A GRY FORD MAVERICK "
"[1] INV - ON RHS / WHI CHEV TRAX // DECLINED MEDICDS"
